message:
test(oracle): add 10 conformance tests (434 total): self-joins, LEFT JOIN, derived tables, CTEs, type coercion

New test suites covering: self-join pairs, BETWEEN expressions, LIKE+OR,
aggregate range, DISTINCT+DESC, empty result aggregation, GROUP BY
expressions, NULLIF/COALESCE chaining, LEFT JOIN IS NULL filtering,
LEFT JOIN with COUNT/COALESCE, derived tables with computed columns +
nested subqueries + VALUES, INSERT OR REPLACE UNIQUE conflict, complex
HAVING with subqueries, UPDATE/DELETE with correlated subqueries, window
running sum/avg/count with ROWS BETWEEN, UNION/INTERSECT/EXCEPT, recursive
CTEs, type coercion edges (integer division, string-to-number, boolean
arithmetic, CAST chaining, typeof).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
